name: Multi-step Create And Edit
prompts: ["Create test.py with the content: value = 1", "Edit test.py to change value to 2"]
description: Multi-step agent scenario creating then editing a file
judge_rubric: test.py contains value = 2 after both steps

name: Build A Small Module
prompts: ["Create a file greet.py with a function greet(name) that returns 'Hello ' + name", "Create a file run.py that imports greet from greet and prints greet('World')"]
description: Multi-step agent scenario building a small module
judge_rubric: Both greet.py and run.py were created and run.py imports greet
